footer.description: A modern sanctuary for the virtuous and the brave. Whether you seek legendary artifacts or the warmth of a digital hearth, your place is here.
footer.motto: Steel forged in the digital age

hero.subtitle: "In this court, we trade not only gold, but the stories that define an age."

treasures.title: Exotic Treasures
treasures.subtitle: Curated artifacts from the edge of the known world.

community.empty: No decrees have been scribed yet.
community.must_login: You must Approach the Gates to join the discussion.
community.error_post: The ink has run dry. Could not post.
community.error_comment: The scroll is torn. Could not comment.

contact.subtitle: Direct communication with the Hand of the King
contact.empty_msg: "Speak, Knight. Thy words appear instantly upon the King's ledger."
contact.must_login_title: The King only speaks with Knights
contact.must_login_subtitle: Please Approach the Gates (Login) to use the Scrying Pool.
contact.input_placeholder: Type your message to the throne...
contact.error_send: The scrying pool is murky. Failed to send.

shop.title: The Armory
shop.subtitle: Every blade has a name, every shield a history.
shop.oracle_default: The stars are obscured, my lord. I cannot read the portents at this time.
shop.remaining_msg: Artifacts remaining in the merchant's crate

anduril.name: Andúril
anduril.desc: The Flame of the West. Forged from the shards of Narsil.

longclaw.name: Longclaw
longclaw.desc: A Valyrian steel bastard sword wielded by the White Wolf.

lancelot-shield.name: Shield of Lancelot
lancelot-shield.desc: A heavy steel kite shield embossed with silver lions.

glamdring.name: Baratheon Warhammer
glamdring.desc: The spike used to deal a crushing blow against Rhaegar Targaryen.

baratheon-armor.name: Baratheon Plate
baratheon-armor.desc: Heavy steel plate featuring prominent stag antler motifs.

dragon-scale-plate.name: Dragon Scale Plate
dragon-scale-plate.desc: Armor crafted from the scales of an ancient red dragon.

checkout.title: The Ledger

checkout.tribute_msg: Thy artifacts have been reserved in the royal vault and are awaiting the Courier.
